prompt: A cinematic anime illustration of a mature woman looking into a dark mirror, but her reflection shows her as a young child. The foreground features the tall, mature woman seen from behind in a three-quarter view, with long straight blonde hair, pale skin, and wearing a dark dress adorned with black feather-like accents on the shoulders. She is reaching out to touch the mirror with her right hand. The mirror reflects a young child version of herself with golden eyes, slightly pointed ears, and a simple white dress with red ribbon bows. The child's hand is pressed against the glass, perfectly aligning with the older woman's hand. The scene has dark, moody, cinematic lighting with a muted, almost sepia-toned color palette, creating high contrast between the pale skin and the dark background. Vertical Japanese text is placed on the left reading 吸血鬼の始祖 怪異の王 キスショット・アセロラオリオン・ハートアンダーブレード and on the right reading 私は・私の中にいる もう一人の私.
